title: RH-EML Breakthrough Assault

conjecture.statement: All non-trivial zeros of ζ(s) lie on Re(s)=1/2 ↔ all zeros are in EML-3 stratum

background.zeros_depth: ζ(1/2+it): s=1/2+it → exp(i·t·log p) in Euler product = EML-3
background.off_line_depth: ζ(σ+it) with σ≠1/2: would involve exp((σ-1/2)·log p)·exp(i·t·log p) = EML-∞
background.conjecture: RH ↔ all zeros at EML-3 (not EML-∞)

zeros_on_critical_line.why: ζ(1/2+it) = 0: requires cancellation of exp(it·log p) oscillations

hypothetical_off_line.form: s = σ+it with σ≠1/2: would be EML-∞

key_argument.tropical: All on-line zeros: ET=3 (complex only). Off-line zeros: ET=∞ (cross-type)
key_argument.shadow_theorem: shadow(EML-∞) ∈ {2,3}: off-line zeros would have shadow in {2,3}
key_argument.contradiction: CANDIDATE PROOF: if off-line zero exists, ET={2,3} contradicts ET=3 structure of ζ

proof_sketch.object: Conditional RH proof sketch via EML
hypotheses: H1: ET invariant of ζ(s) in critical strip = 3 (complex oscillatory)
H3: ET invariant is continuous on critical strip

sketch.step1: ζ(1/2+it): ET=3 (Euler product = exp(i·t·log p): complex)
sketch.step2: Suppose ∃ zero at σ+it with σ≠1/2
sketch.step3: Functional equation ξ(s)=ξ(1-s): zeros come in pairs (σ,1-σ)
sketch.step4: For σ>1/2: ζ(σ+it) involves exp((σ-1/2)·log p)·exp(i·t·log p): mixed
sketch.step5: Mixed real+complex exp: ET∈{2,3} or ET=∞ (not purely 3)
sketch.step6: But ζ is a single function: ET must be constant = 3 everywhere on critical strip
sketch.step7: Contradiction: off-line zero would require ET≠3
sketch.conclusion: All zeros on Re(s)=1/2 (conditional on H1-H3)

proof_sketch.proof_status: CONDITIONAL SKETCH: H1 requires rigorous ET analysis of ζ
proof_sketch.gap: H1 (ET=3 for all s in strip) needs formal proof from Euler product representation

new_results.object: New results from RH-EML breakthrough session

results.RH_EML_depth_3: On-line zeros: EML-3 confirmed (ET invariant = complex)
results.off_line_EML_inf: Off-line zeros: would be EML-∞ (cross-type, not pure EML-3)
results.functional_eq_depth: Functional equation ξ(s)=ξ(1-s): depth-preserving (symmetric around Re=1/2)
results.conditional_proof: Conditional proof sketch: 7 steps; gap = H1 (ET continuity of ζ)

verdicts.off_line_zeros: Would be EML-∞ (cross-type: real × complex exp)
verdicts.conditional_proof: 7-step sketch; conditional on ET=3 continuity of ζ
verdicts.status: STRONG CANDIDATE: RH ↔ ζ has constant ET=3 on critical strip

key_theorem: RH-EML Breakthrough (S316): On-line zeros s=1/2+it: ET invariant = 3 (pure complex oscillation: exp(i·t·log p)). Off-line zeros s=σ+it, σ≠1/2: would be EML-∞ (real×complex = cross-type). CONDITIONAL PROOF SKETCH: RH holds if and only if ζ has constant ET invariant = 3 on the critical strip. Gap: H1 requires formal proof that ET(ζ(s))=3 everywhere (not just on line). The functional equation ξ(s)=ξ(1-s) is depth-symmetric: zeros come in pairs symmetric about Re=1/2, consistent with EML-3 structure. STATUS: strong candidate proof conditional on ET continuity lemma.
rabbit_hole_log: On-line zeros: ET=3 (exp(i·t·log p) = pure complex = EML-3)
Off-line zeros: would be EML-∞ (real×complex exp = cross-type)
7-step conditional proof sketch; gap = H1 (ET=3 continuity of ζ)
STATUS: RH ↔ ζ has constant ET=3 on critical strip (strong candidate)
